_comment: Isolated claude-config for the reasoning-system agents. install.sh places it in CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR (next to the instance) + symlinks .credentials.json for Claude auth. deny mcp__* cuts the Operator's PERSONAL connectors (n8n, Google Drive, etc.) that would otherwise be inherited from ~/.claude. Web is NOT cut — it's granted per role. See docs/setup-runbook.md.
